title: Snow Side Texture
description: Snow side connected to all blocks
body:
# **Snow Side Texture**
Feeling weird why the snow texture is only on the side of the grass block?
ok, not anymore


### **Background**

why this resource was created?
nothing i just thought and i found a good mod to do it


### **So what is this?**

This is a resource pack that will make snow blocks have a overlay texture when placed on any block, not just grass.

Note: _This resource pack requires the [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)_ .

With the Fusion mod, the pack only adds textures without needing to edit vanilla files, so it will work with any texture pack as long as it doesn't change the block model so it won't look weird.


### **Warning!**
### **Match your Minecraft version to the version supported by the resource pack!.**
### **Resource packs with the latest version support cannot be installed on older versions of Minecraft!.**
